title: StopEvent
description: A departure or arrival event at a stop, used to retrieve the next or previous vehicle movements at a specific location.

estimatedTime.description: Estimated actual time for the event

serviceJourneyRef.description: Reference to the vehicle journey for this event

stopPointRef.description: Reference to the stop point where the event occurs

id.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment stop

instructions.description: Instructions for passengers at this stop

time.description: Expected time window at this stop
